textByHash.c7d19b00a132644cc939780d266e9b8d682e800b: Urgh, it just happened again! Every time I almost have it my hand slips.
textByHash.e00daae9d564bb2588f0606f48e7e67e2be8108c: Yes. Well actually, I'm using a Strange old lockpick. I found it while looting one of these coffins and I typically have better luck with it.
textByHash.ae11552bc0572b8ac8fb88ecef3f370be52fd1de: I've found a few of them while raiding this place. There appear to be more of them on this floor than the floors above.
textByHash.d656a132392e63392461f51a20363d30596a457d: Oh, it's because of this little fellow following me. I've heard that the Dark acorn sold by the guy upstairs will transform him into a Dark Squirrel.
textByHash.4e1b975c8483c31e488d01c5545a79ad3d5ebef0: Yeah, that's what I thought but that mysterious stranger is asking for 3,000 Hallowed marks for it.
textByHash.75f5f36d7a54e25dc95449ddb425d73810e03614: Yeah, that's what I thought. Feels like he set the price just to keep me down here for longer. Still, it's not like I have anything better to do.
textByHash.a2b80c788bbd018c4cf151ff86c34bf35900e6cd: Wow, I'm impressed! How long did it take you to get the 3,000 marks?
textByHash.6af349985e942e85cdeb0482fc76c3cefcce1551: I don't think I'm going to get any more agile while looking for it myself. I'm glad you received some benefit from the grind though.
textByHash.417404c75de7567da6edc55211ff1c13459f63b4: Agh, thought I had it that time!
